creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 177709
update source url of zip

Since the Broadcom buyout of Avago, the original source zip is no longer available from avago's website.

The attached patch points to the new URL for fetching.
No checksum changes have occurred so it's just a simple update.

Please also merge into quarterly (it'll stop me getting the pkg-fallout msgs!)
